title: Gilbert Chamber Foundation brings AI basics to local businesses

title: Dougal Sutherland: The pros and cons of using AI for emotional support
description: AI chatbots are becoming part of everyday life - not just for keeping track of All Whites v Belgium or practical tasks, but for companionship, advice, and emotional support.

title: Open web was never built to become free training data for AI chatbots
description: AI chatbots are reshaping the open web, sparking legal battles and ethical questions over consent, data scraping, and who controls online content.

title: More Layoffs, Acquisitions, and SpaceX Becomes AI Company
description: Are layoffs starting to backfire in Silicon Valley? Employees at Meta Platforms are starting to revolt against cuts and reassignments.
